projectDescription: A vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript component that renders a macOS-style draggable and closable window UI element.
keyFeatures: Draggable window via title bar mousedown/mousemove/mouseup events
Close button that hides the window (red traffic-light button)
macOS-style traffic-light window control buttons (close, minimize, maximize)
Absolute positioning with centered initial placement
Automatic dark mode support via prefers-color-scheme media query
Zero dependencies — pure vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Gradient background (light blue-to-pink in light mode, dark in dark mode)
publicApiSurface: #window-buttons — container for the three traffic-light buttons
.btn.close — red close button (#ff3939), hides the window on click
titleBar mousedown — starts drag, records offset
document mousemove — updates window position while dragging
closeBtn click — sets display:none on title bar and window container
